summary: VenuLoQ Bug Fixes Testing Complete - All 3 bugs verified fixed: 1) /my-enquiries now redirects to /home, 2) Google login redirects to auth.emergentagent.com (Emergent-managed auth) on non-production domains, 3) CustomerHome renders correctly with no freezing. All back buttons (Invoices, Payments, MyBookings) navigate to /home. Venue back button visible and functional.
critical_code_review_comments: BUG FIX 1 VERIFIED: /my-enquiries route now redirects to /home (App.js line ~204-207)
BUG FIX 2 VERIFIED: Google login on non-production domains redirects to auth.emergentagent.com (Emergent-managed auth)
BUG FIX 3 VERIFIED: CustomerHome renders correctly with greeting, active case hero card, action pills, explore banner, bottom tab bar
BACK BUTTONS VERIFIED: InvoicesPage, PaymentsPage, MyBookingsPage all navigate to /home (not /my-enquiries)
VENUE BACK BUTTON VERIFIED: Visible at top-left with safe-area-inset-top padding, clickable and navigates back
BOTTOM TAB BAR VERIFIED: Shows 5 tabs (Home, Explore, My Case, Messages, Profile) for authenticated users
NO SCREEN FREEZING: All navigation transitions smooth, no freezing observed during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 bugs from the problem statement are fixed and verified: 1) /my-enquiries redirects to /home, 2) Google auth uses Emergent-managed auth on non-production domains, 3) No screen freezing. CustomerHome is the new customer dashboard at /home with warm white theme. All back buttons navigate to /home.

features_verified.Auth_page_loads: PASS - Google, Email, Password buttons all present
features_verified.Google_login_redirect: PASS - Redirects to auth.emergentagent.com (Emergent-managed auth) on preview domain
features_verified.Password_login_flow: PASS - Click 'Sign in with password instead', enter credentials, redirects to /home
features_verified.CustomerHome_greeting: PASS - Shows 'Welcome back, Test' with Cormorant Garamond font
features_verified.Active_case_hero_card: PASS - Dark card with event type (Anniversary), city (Mumbai), guests (200), stage progress, RM info
features_verified.Action_pills: PASS - Messages, Payments, Shared pills displayed
features_verified.Explore_venues_banner: PASS - Image banner with 'Explore Venues' CTA
features_verified.Bottom_tab_bar: PASS - 5 tabs (Home, Explore, My Case, Messages, Profile) visible
features_verified.Venue_back_button_visible: PASS - White circular button at top-left with chevron-left icon
features_verified.Venue_back_button_clickable: PASS - Navigates back to previous page
features_verified.No_screen_freezing: PASS - All navigation smooth, no freezing observed

mocked_apis.razorpay: Razorpay is in TEST MODE - payments use /simulate endpoint

bugs_fixed_verification.bug_1_old_dashboard_accessible: FIXED - /my-enquiries now redirects to /home, old MyEnquiriesPage no longer accessible
bugs_fixed_verification.bug_2_google_login_failing: FIXED - Google login uses Emergent-managed auth (auth.emergentagent.com) on non-production domains
bugs_fixed_verification.bug_3_screen_freezing: FIXED - No freezing observed during navigation testing
